name: Olive Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ingredients in your breadmaker according to the manufacturer's instructions. Add more flour or liquid if needed to achieve a dough ball that is pliable and slightly tacky (no dough adheres to your finger when touched).
2. Bake on the white bread cycle.
3. For olive bread, use 1/4 cup of liquid brine as it was sufficient for my recipe. It was plenty tasty. You can experiment by adding more brine and less water if desired.
4. Coarsely chop the olives before incorporating them into the bread to prevent them from being too finely incorporated.
5. These loaves are wonderful for gatherings like last weekend's family barbecue and were devoured.
6. With repeated making, you should have beautiful tall, moist loaves. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.
